CustomField.description: This custom email field will be used for the purpose of communicating with the Case Technician. Will be populated from the Case Technician and used in another workflow rule to send an alert if a Callback is expected.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This custom email field will be used for the purpose of communicating with the Case Technician. Will be populated from the Case Technician and used in another workflow rule to send an alert if a Callback is expected.
CustomField.label: Callback Technician Email
